alerts.headline: Revenue up 116% vs prior period
alerts.explanation: Total net revenue reached $67,595 — up 116% period-over-period.
alerts.action: Review top-performing days and server assignments to sustain the momentum.

alerts.headline: Food cost up 2.1 points to 34.6%
alerts.explanation: Ribeye (cost +11%) and Halibut (cost +14%) are primary drivers. Both high-volume items are pushing food cost above the 32.5% target.
alerts.action: Renegotiate Sysco protein pricing. Consider Branzino swap for Halibut (22% lower cost) and add a Ribeye supplement charge.

alerts.headline: Strong Saturday confirmed — 651 covers this period
alerts.explanation: 0 VIP guests tracked. Ensure top server coverage for peak night.
alerts.action: Pre-assign top servers (Fab, Daniel) to VIP tables. Brief kitchen on timing. Confirm celebration packages are prepped.
